scenario.name: SIP INVITE
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tls> Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1234 1234 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=SIPp Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [local_port] RTP/SAVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:[field2]

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
